name: slideshow
description: Fullscreen single-slide presentation with animated prev/next navigation. One slide active at a time; slides transition with CSS opacity/transform animations.

content_rules.notes: Fullscreen layout demands one message per slide. Short titles, minimal bullets. Dense text breaks the visual rhythm. Prefer visuals over text blocks.

incompatible_styles.name: visual-heavy
incompatible_styles.reason: visual-heavy uses full-bleed CSS background-image which conflicts with slideshow's rounded-card layout (border-radius clips the bleed). Use a slideshow-specific visual style instead.

incompatible_styles.name: academic
incompatible_styles.reason: academic's 30% illustration side panel shrinks to unreadable width in fullscreen slideshow aspect ratio.

recommended_structure.notes: Optimized for fast transitions and presentations. Each 'chapter' = one topic + 2-3 detail slides + a single strong punchline. Avoid long text blocks.

author: co-deck
